explanations.8: The 'set -e -x' command makes the script exit immediately if any command fails and print each command before running it, which helps catch errors early.
explanations.15: ARG creates a build-time variable that can be passed when building the image with '--build-arg VERSION=...' to change which Dagger version gets installed.
explanations.16: This uses variable substitution to build the filename from the VERSION variable, so if VERSION changes, the filename updates automatically.
explanations.22: The ${ARCHIVE} and ${URL} variables are being substituted here with the values defined on lines 16 and 17.
